note: Run backend/scripts/ingest.py --force to rebuild this file and index.faiss from the repository PDFs.

chunks.text: Retirement planning works best when saving starts early and continues consistently. Planning should account for spending needs, inflation, healthcare costs, longevity, and retirement cash flow.
Personal finance management includes budgeting, cash flow, emergency reserves, borrowing control, insurance, investing, tax planning, retirement planning, and estate planning.
Indian investment markets include equity, debt, mutual funds, government securities, money market instruments, and regulated products. Each instrument has different risk and return characteristics.
Tax planning compares income, deductions, exemptions, 80C, 80D, NPS, HRA, home loan interest, and old versus new tax regime choices based on actual eligibility.
Risk planning reviews family responsibilities, medical costs, income stability, debt, investment volatility, and insurance adequacy before taking financial decisions.
